items.name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️ This chain wallet is a new addition to the Gucci Horsebit 1955 accessories collection, crafted from the brand's classic interlocking GG canvas and featuring the double-ring and rectangular design inherited from the series' handbags. The classic flip-top button closure features multiple card slots and pockets, and the detachable chain strap creates versatile styling. White leather details create a chic and fashionable look.
items.name_cn:
!!️With full original green box packaging!!️ This chain wallet is a new addition to the Gucci Horsebit 1955 accessories collection, crafted from the brand's classic interlocking GG canvas and featuring the double-ring and rectangular design inherited from the series' handbags. The classic flip-top button closure features multiple card slots and pockets, and the detachable chain strap creates versatile styling. White leather details create a chic and fashionable look.
Beige/Ebony GG Supreme canvas
White leather details
Gold-tone hardware
Cloud print fabric and suede lining
Horsebit details
Interior: 6 card slots, 1 flat pocket, 1 gusseted zip pocket, and 1 open pocket
1 zip pocket
1 open pocket
Detachable chain strap height 58cm
Button closure
Weight: approx. 0.3kg
Model: 621892.
Open dimensions: 19cm (W) x 21cm (H) x 2.5cm (D)
Closed dimensions: 19cm (W) x 10cm (H) x 4cm (D)
Color: White/pvc.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🔥With full original green box packaging🔥【New】This small Gucci Horsebit 1955 shoulder bag continues the equestrian style, paired with double-ring and rectangular designs, cleverly blending light gold-tone details with patent leather.
items.name_cn:
🔥With full original green box packaging🔥【New】This small Gucci Horsebit 1955 shoulder bag continues the equestrian style, paired with double-ring and rectangular designs, cleverly blending light gold-tone details with patent leather.
Black patent leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front features horsebit details
Sides feature half-horsebit details
Interior: Two main compartments and one zip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap (height 28cm - 50cm); length adjustable from 71cm to 114cm
Flip-top closure
Model: 815178.
Dimensions: 26cm (W) x 17.5cm (H) x 10cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.85kg
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: .🌷《With full set of original green box packaging》🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag
items.name_cn:
.🌷《With full set of original green box packaging》🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 series handbags, interpreting the double-ring and rectangular design that inherits the brand's equestrian roots, under the vision of Creative Director Sabato De Sarno for the Qixi Valentine's Day campaign. This small shoulder bag is crafted from new GG canvas, featuring a unique heat-pressed pattern for a delicate look and a soft, refined touch.
Exclusive for Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined touch
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Side details: Half horsebit
Interior: 3 open pockets, 1 zip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Flap closure
Model: 815178.
Dimensions: 25.9cm (L) x 17.5cm (W) x 9.9cm (D)
Color: Burgundy full grain/Original leather.
Made in Italy
